PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-18-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gilbert Jay for (petitioner) Alfred Moy.

The Court stated that there is a discrepancy in the attestation clause with respect to what was being signed. Mr. Jay reported that he has filed a declaration and that it was an oversight on his part. The Court stated that there have been no objections, that it appears to be a clerical/attorney error and that the will reflects the decedents intent. The Court granted the petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary (subject to review of the order). The status on close of estate is set for February 14, 2017.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
